matches.matched_text: Lave a whale a while in a whillbarrow (isn't it the truath Fm tallin ye?) to have fins and flippers

matches.reasoning: Fm is abbreviated form of Finn; 'fins' pun on Finn's name

matches.matched_text: Mr Finnimore, sir. And take your laysure like a god on pension

matches.reasoning: Finnimore is direct variant of Finnegan/Finn; explicit address with 'Mr'

matches.matched_text: Your fame is spreading like Basilico's ointment since the Fintan Lalors piped you overborder

matches.matched_text: As when you drove with her to Findrinny Fair

matches.reasoning: Findrinny is direct garbled spelling mixing Finn + drinny (drinking); Finn again motif

matches.snippet: Repose you now! Finn no more!
matches.reasoning: Explicit direct spelling of 'Finn'; end-of-episode marker playing on 'Finn again' resurrection theme
